name: Societe Anonyme des Bains de Mer et du Cercle des Etrangers a Monaco
summary: Soci√É¬©t√É¬© Anonyme des Bains de Mer et du Cercle des √É¬âtrangers √É¬† Monaco operates in the gaming, hotels, and rental sectors in Monaco. The company operates casinos; hotels; restaurants; lounge bars and nightclubs; wellness and leisure facilities; shows and concert halls; shopping centers; and meetings and events centers. It is also involved in the slot machines, table games, and other activities; and rental of boutiques, offices, and residential properties. In addition, the company offers catering and bar services. The company was founded in 1863 and is headquartered in Monaco.
